name: Zanskar Valley
description: One of the most remote and wildly beautiful regions in Ladakh, famous for its rugged terrain, deep gorges, and the extreme Chadar frozen river trek.
history: Historically an isolated Tibetan Buddhist kingdom.
famousFor: Chadar Trek, river rafting, Phugtal Monastery.
bestTime: June to September (Summer), January to February (Chadar Trek)
